'''Alderaanian ale''' was an extremely rare, fermented [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] [[Ale/Legends|ale]], brewed from fragrant [[Grain/Legends|grains]] once native to [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. It had a smooth, rich flavor. Also, it was both [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] and [[Garris Shrike]]'s favorite drink.

{{Food-stub}}
